title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: Have you ever been abroad? Where did you go?
Do you prefer city breaks or holidays in the countryside? Why?
Would you ever consider living in another country? Why or why not?
What's the most interesting place you have ever visited?
What do you think is the best way to travel – by train, plane, or car?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: What do you think travelling teaches you that you can't learn from books?
Do you think people from different cultures have more in common than people think?
Would you rather explore a new country alone or with a group?
